shortDescription: IDP India · General Training · 8–10 week batch · Books included

policyAlert.summary: General Training only — not Academic. Confirm Canada PR / citizenship or other GT pathway before enrollment. Book exam on ieltsidpindia.com. Never guarantee a band score.

alert.title: General Training module only
alert.body: Canada Express Entry, citizenship, and many settlement routes require IELTS GT (or Academic where IRCC states). University study requires Academic — do not enroll GT for study visas.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured IELTS General Training preparation — GT Reading & Writing focus, plus Listening and Speaking — with course books, trainer-led classes, and full GT mocks.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Canada PR (Express Entry), citizenship, UK settlement, and other migration pathways requiring IELTS GT — not university admission.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Regular pace over 8–10 weeks. Classroom or hybrid. Books issued at enrollment.

about.label: Exam authority (India)
about.value: IDP IELTS India (ieltsidpindia.com) — sole test booking channel since July 2021. Student selects General Training at registration.

about.label: After course
about.value: TRF handoff to visa team, CLB mapping for Canada files, retake plan if below pathway minimum.

eligibility.criterion: Migration / PR pathway confirmed — GT required (not Academic)
Diagnostic or prior GT score on file
Realistic CLB / band target vs current level

redFlagsBanner: Study-abroad leads needing Academic must not stay in GT batch. Confirm IRCC accepts GT for the specific program before enrollment.

redFlags.title: Academic booked at IDP by mistake
redFlags.fix: Cancel and rebook GT before test

faqs.a: Academic for university. GT for most Canada PR/citizenship and many work/settlement routes.
Approximately IELTS 6.0 in each skill (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking).
Yes for Regular (with books) — issue at enrollment.
Student pays IDP on ieltsidpindia.com — separate from coaching fee.

faqs.q: Is TOEFL accepted for Canada PR?
faqs.a: No. IRCC accepts IELTS GT/Academic (per program) and CELPIP — not TOEFL.

compliance: Never guarantee an IELTS band score
Confirm GT module and pathway before enrollment
Separate coaching fee from IDP exam fee
Record CLB target on Canada files
proTips: Map every Canada lead to CLB before quoting timeline
Use GT letter-writing drills early — Task 1 differs from Academic
Link TRF to Express Entry file as soon as scores arrive
postApproval: Notify visa team with CLB breakdown
Plan retake if any skill below minimum

timeline.title: GT classes, letter writing, reading drills
IDP GT booking, test day, TRF to visa team

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial IELTS General Regular coaching specimen.

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Do not place study-visa Academic inquiries in GT Regular — wrong module and wrong prep.

donts: Book Academic exam for GT student
mistakes: Visa team not updated when TRF arrives

sampleDocs.title: CLB mapping sheet (mock)
sampleDocs.description: IELTS GT score to CLB per skill.

quiz.question: IELTS General Training is typically required for:
quiz.explanation: GT is standard for many Canadian immigration pathways.

quiz.question: CLB 7 for Express Entry FSW equals approximately:
quiz.explanation: CLB 7 maps to 6.0 in each skill.

quiz.question: A student visa applicant should enroll in:
GT Writing Task 1 is typically:
quiz.explanation: GT Task 1 is a letter; Academic Task 1 is a report.

quiz.question: IELTS exam fee in India is paid to:
TOEFL is accepted by IRCC for Canadian PR:
quiz.explanation: IRCC does not accept TOEFL for immigration.

quiz.question: At IDP registration, GT student must select:
quiz.explanation: Module must match coaching and visa pathway.

quiz.question: Before exam booking, GT Regular recommends:
quiz.explanation: Same readiness standard as Academic Regular.

quiz.question: Books in GT Regular (with books) are:
quiz.explanation: Issue and log books on Day 1.

quiz.question: Listening and Speaking in GT vs Academic:
quiz.explanation: L/S are the same; R/W differ.

quiz.question: British Council India role for IELTS exam:
quiz.explanation: IDP is sole booking channel since July 2021.
